name: ai-startups
description: Series A-D AI / dev-tools startups showing growth-motion buying signals

weights.hypothesis: A first GTM/growth hire means the company is staffing a motion it hasn't systematized - highest receptivity to tooling and outside help
Growth-engineering roles signal an experimentation culture being built right now
AI-engineering hiring indicates budget and ambition but not necessarily a growth motion
Generic engineering volume is weak evidence of anything beyond existence
GTM hiring at volume means the motion is already staffed and systematized - mild expansion signal, not a first-hire receptivity window
A raise in the last ~6 months means budget exists and growth targets were just promised to a board
Recent press indicates external momentum and founder attention on narrative

compounds.hypothesis: Fresh capital plus active growth-eng hiring is the strongest 'why now' - money and mandate at the same time
